text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Spe? There's no harm in giving it a
try, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-wowie! You made this supplement all yourself,
Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And it's full of nutrients for smooth, radiant skin
and glossy hair! I wonder what other benefits it'll
have!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's right! How about it, then? With this special
offer made just for you... you can have it for free!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Agnes Tachyon is using some shady sales
talk on Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Free?! A-are you sure?! Thanks so much, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, yes. Go ahead, now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You... really shouldn't do that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, hello there, Cafe... and Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You have no idea... what could happen. Your
hair... could start growing. Or, you could start
glowing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Glowing?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Glowing! Now isn't that something! That
wouldn't be a hindrance to your daily life in the
slightest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you taking this is for the advancement of
Umamusume-kind. A worthy sacrifice!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just where would we be if it weren't for past
sacrifices, hm?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Worthy? For who? You'd be the only one to... get
something out of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... sorry! On second thought, I think I'll
pass!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Agh, my precious Umamusume test subject...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well... I should leave... too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Whoa whoa! Hold on, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What is it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My losing Spe is due to your meddling. Have
some accountability for your actions and take my
supplement in her place!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I always... ask myself this... but have you ever
considered... testing it on yourself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'd take it! But, it's practically useless
obtaining results from only myself!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even two or three participants wouldn't be an
ample sample size!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I won't... do it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! How could you say that?! Come ooon,
Cafe! Help me out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To achieve accurate results, it's necessary to
examine every Umamusume under various
conditions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon seems to be just one "no" away
from throwing a full tantrum. What to do...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...You?! But you're not an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You shouldn't be so picky when... it comes to
people offering help.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I know... Trainer has always been very proactive when it comes to these things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! You should learn a thing or two from
Trainer's enthusiasm, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You... must have a lot on your plate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe looks at me sympathetically as I
head to the laboratory with Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Please! Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I already told you no.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hrngh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe takes a pill out of Agnes
Tachyon's pocket and forces it into Tachyon's
mouth.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Argh... It's... so bright...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... This is quite a valuable experience, but... it's
so bright I can't see anything! My eyes hurt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon continues to glow for three days
and three nights...
